message:
fix: connector HTTP import migration, URL encoding, supply chain attestation, and test fixes

Connectors:
- discord, slack: Migrate HTTP imports from asupersync::http::h1 to
  fcp_async_core::http.
- calendly: Fix URL injection — user_uri now encoded via query_pairs_mut
  instead of string interpolation.

fcp-sandbox/wasi.rs: Fix test for raw_socket_host_policy tightening.
fwc/lifecycle_install.rs: Make attestation required for supply chain.
fcp-store/Cargo.toml: Remove unused asupersync dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
